name: Half-Treated, Half Not
text:
Put half a sludge counter on each creature you control. (Yes, half. Split the difference and argue about it.) A creature with a fractional sludge counter is treated as having the next whole number up whenever that helps you and the next whole number down whenever it helps an opponent.
Draw half a card, rounded up to a whole card because you cannot draw half a card, you tried, it didn't work, stop trying.
flavorText: The plant runs at 50% capacity, which is to say it runs the water through and shrugs.
